body:
## **Code Change for [BCEN-4843](https://strategyagile.atlassian.net/browse/BCEN-4843 "URL link to the defect or user story")**

### **Description**
We will refresh the report by entering NoAction mode on blocking errors.
PD: https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/~yuanli/pages/5901516841/BCIN-6709+Improve+the+behavior+for+end+user+to+allow+continued+operations+on+report+in+Library+after+error+happens.#2.3.1--I-Server

### **Root Cause**
Explain the underlying cause of the requirement or defect.

### Implementation/Fix
Summarize the approach taken to resolve the issue, including key changes or enhancements made in the code.

### Testing
- [x] Memory leak check completed
- [ ] ABA tests executed
  - Refer to [Desktop_Local ABA Category Mapping](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TECServerPlatformDocumentSvcs/pages/376864887/Desktop+Local+ABA+Category+Mapping) and [Platform Services_Local ABA Category Mapping](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TECServerPlatformDocumentSvcs/pages/366248274/Platform+Services+Local+ABA+Category+Mapping)
- [ ] Test cases covered：*[list key scenarios tested]*.


### To Do
Mention any remaining tasks or possible future improvements related to this change.
